payloadPreview.text: Metis AI POC plain-text check (2026-04-25): For 2026-04-18 to 2026-04-24, the account spent 4,243.77 and generated 320,745 impressions, 76,334 reach, 7,695 clicks, a 2.4% CTR, $0.55 CPC, and 4.2 frequency. Overall delivery shows solid click volume with moderate cost efficiency, while performance varies meaningfully across campaigns.
Weekly snapshot: spend 4,243.77 drove 320,745 impressions, 7,695 clicks, 2.4% CTR, and $0.55 CPC. Best campaign CTRs were 6.34% and 5.30%; two campaigns were below 0.80% CTR and should be reviewed.

text.text: For 2026-04-18 to 2026-04-24, the account spent 4,243.77 and generated 320,745 impressions, 76,334 reach, 7,695 clicks, a 2.4% CTR, $0.55 CPC, and 4.2 frequency. Overall delivery shows solid click volume with moderate cost efficiency, while performance varies meaningfully across campaigns.

*Next actions*
• Review the two lowest-CTR campaigns and test new creative or audience refinements.
• Shift budget toward the campaigns with 5.30% and 6.34% CTR if downstream quality is acceptable.
• Check landing page experience for the 5,617 landing_page_view actions to ensure clicks are converting into site visits as expected.
• Monitor frequency and creative performance to avoid further efficiency decline.
